hal_modules.name: power
hal_modules.description: Power management — battery, charging, performance profiles (HIDL Power 1.3)

hal_modules.name: audio
hal_modules.description: Audio routing via PulseAudio/PipeWire to vendor codec (HIDL Audio 7.0)

hal_modules.name: camera
hal_modules.description: Camera access via libcamera to vendor camera HAL (HIDL Camera 2.7)

hal_modules.name: sensors
hal_modules.description: Sensor data via iio-sensor-proxy to vendor sensor HAL (HIDL Sensors 2.1)

hal_modules.name: graphics
hal_modules.description: GPU/display via Mir compositor to vendor graphics (HIDL Composer 2.4)

hal_modules.name: wifi
hal_modules.description: WiFi via wpa_supplicant/NetworkManager to vendor WiFi driver (HIDL WiFi 1.6)

hal_modules.name: telephony
hal_modules.description: Telephony/SIM via oFono/ModemManager to vendor radio HAL (HIDL Radio 1.6)

hal_modules.name: input
hal_modules.description: Touchscreen/input classifier via libinput (HIDL has no input HAL — synthetic)

hal_modules.name: gnss
hal_modules.description: GNSS/GPS via gpsd/geoclue to vendor GNSS HAL (HIDL GNSS 2.1)

hal_modules.name: bluetooth
hal_modules.description: Bluetooth via BlueZ to vendor BT firmware (HIDL Bluetooth 1.1)

hal_modules.name: vibrator
hal_modules.description: Vibrator via sysfs timed_output/LED/FF input (HIDL Vibrator 1.3)

hal_modules.name: fingerprint
hal_modules.description: Fingerprint auth via fprintd/libfprint to vendor fingerprint HAL (HIDL Fingerprint 2.3)

hal_modules.name: face
hal_modules.description: Face auth via Howdy/IR camera to vendor face HAL (HIDL Face 1.0)
